content.en:
After the birth of the ancestral monument, there were more and more creatures in the new universe, and even many forces began to migrate to the new universe, and the human race also occupied an area in the new universe.

However, judging from the current situation, the eternal universe is still the foundation of the human race.

In the beginning, the events caused by the ancestral monument were sensational, but as time passed, the influence of the ancestral monument gradually faded.

After all, the others didn't get any benefits from the ancestral monument, they only felt that the ancestral monument was very powerful and powerful, and the rest didn't know.

But the gods and generals soon reaped substantial benefits from the ancestral monument, that is, luck!

Amazing luck, even far more than the luck gained by occupying some territory and controlling many races.

It can be said that as long as he occupies the top position on the list of god generals, the luck he obtains is simply unimaginable.

Suddenly, those god generals were not interested in occupying the hole cards to invade other forces, so it was better to work hard to improve their strength.

For example, Ye Tian, the number one god general on the list, the luck he obtained is simply endless!

Under such circumstances, his comprehension had risen to a terrifying level, and his cultivation speed was also extremely fast.

So, Ye Tian immediately entered the retreat and cultivated with all his might.

In just a thousand years, Ye Tian had cultivated the Xuanxuan Jue to the fourth-level consummation realm, and his strength had been raised to the level of a peak god general in the early stage of the four-star stage.

"You can take the True Blood Fruit!"

Ye Tian took out the True Blood Fruit and swallowed one of the True Blood Fruits in one gulp.

Rumble!!!!

The energy of the True Blood Fruit continued to refine Ye Tian's blood, and the power of the blood became stronger and stronger, gradually revealing a coercion, which was transforming towards True Blood.

However, the power of a True Blood Fruit was exhausted, and it did not completely transform True Blood.

Then, Ye Tian swallowed another True Blood Fruit and continued to refine the energy of the True Blood Fruit.

In this way, one by one the True Blood Fruits were swallowed by Ye Tian and refined and exhausted, until the sixth True Blood Fruit was also refined, a trace of True Blood appeared in his body.

Its true blood continues to devour other bloods, slowly transforming into new true blood.

"It's successful, and the true blood is finally born, although it's still far from the true blood all over the body, but with my current true blood level, I'm afraid it's not weaker than some real top true blood descendants, or even surpassed. Only those second-generation True Ancestor heirs can surpass me in True Blood Purity!" Ye Tian muttered.

From this moment on, his foundation was far beyond the rest of the universe.

True blood was born, and Ye Tian's physical body was also continuously strengthened under the nourishment of true blood.

The blood feeds back into the physical body, and every moment, Ye Tian's physical body is getting stronger, and as Ye Tian cultivates the Xuanxuan Technique, the physical body progresses faster.

Thousands of years have passed, Ye Tian's physical body has finally broken the shackles, and the Xuanxuan Jue has finally stepped from the fourth layer to the fifth layer realm in one fell swoop, and the strength of the whole person has skyrocketed.

The new universe, the ancestral monument god will be on the list.

The number one on the list of god generals is still Ye Tian, but people find that Ye Tian's realm has changed.

No. 1 on the list of god generals: Ten thousand law god generals, four-star mid-term god generals

After the four-star god general, the strength gap between each small realm is very large, the four-star mid-stage god general can easily defeat the four-star early stage god general, and Ye Tian stepped into the four-star mid-stage god general in a short time, and his strength skyrocketed.

And the Phantom Feather God General, who is second on the list of god generals, is still in the early stage of three stars, which shows Ye Tian's horror.

Yuangu Holy Land.

The Yuan Gu Divine General couldn't help but be shocked when he learned that Ye Tian had stepped into the mid-four-star Divine General.

"The Ten Thousand Dharma Divine General is already qualified to transcend, but he has not been detached, it seems that he wants to become a more powerful transcendent, not an ordinary transcendent. If it were me, I would have transcended it a long time ago with such strength. The Yuan Gu God General said with a smile.

The eternal universe, the temple of the hidden gods.

Zhang Lingshen, who was already a one-star late-stage god general, had entered the four-star mid-stage stage, and he was extremely jealous and envious, but he sneered: "The god will be the first on the list, hehe, you will not be the first on the god list soon, maybe you will die soon." Some geniuses in the chaos poured in, not to mention four-star god generals, even if they were six or seven star god generals, there were a lot of them, you were a mere four-star god general, and you had no backer, what do you compare with others?"

However, he is just talking, after all, the Tibetan God Organization has also given up here, and he may not necessarily send people in, and he has no backing.

this day.

The Red River True Ancestor of the Shadow of the Chaos Transcendent Force once again came to the Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe with an Origin Universe Heart.

The heart of the Origin Universe is about ten miles in size, similar to a tiny universe, and is entirely composed of Origin Universe.

Many Heavenly Monarchs and True Monarchs also saw the Origin Universe Heart for the first time, and they looked at it one by one, and the Red River True Ancestor didn't care about these people's eyes at all, but used the power of the True Ancestor to forcibly integrate the Universe Origin Heart into the new universe formed by the fusion of the Cangyu Universe and the Eternal Universe.

Rumble!!!

It was as if a great sun had been crammed into a new universe, and the terrifying power permeated the twin universes.

In the first moment, the countless creatures of the Twin Universes sensed the energy of the Origin Cosmic Heart.

Especially in the new universe, those who stayed here looked at the Great Sun in the void in shock, and the power released by the Great Sun continued to affect the New Universe, and the speed of the fusion of the two universes also accelerated many times.

Originally, it would take more than 9 million years to fuse to the final moment, but now it will only take 900,000 years at most to reach the final moment if the speed of fusion continues.

"It's over, the speed of cosmic fusion has accelerated, there are only 900,000 years left, and we are dead!"

Some of the earthly deities and gods will despair.

Nine hundred thousand detachment, how could they do it!

But soon, a piece of news came out, and countless creatures in the dual universe were excited.

That round of the Great Sun was the heart of the Origin Universe, and although it accelerated the fusion of the two universes, it could guarantee that the fusion of the two universes would be 100% successful.

In other words, the great universe will inevitably be born, and no one will die because the universe is broken.

This is the power of chaos to strike!

Many people who were weak in cultivation didn't understand what was going on, and some even thought that the Tibetan God Organization did it, but Ye Tian knew very well that this matter had nothing to do with the Tibetan God Organization.

The Tibetan God Organization still can't get the Origin Cosmic Heart, it must be a more powerful force intervening, and there must be more than one force.

"The ancestral monument was born, and a large number of True Ancestors of Chaos probably want to get their hands on this universe, they naturally will not let the dual universe be broken, not only will they let the dual universe merge into a large universe, but they will also find a way to make the great universe become a Dao realm. "

Ye Tiandao.

From this point of view, this is a good thing.

But once it becomes a great universe, the God General in the Chaos and the True Monarch of the Mandate of Heaven only need to pay a small price to enter, and the competition will reach an unprecedented level!

Ye Tian now has two choices, one is to detach and stay away from this dispute, and the other is to wait for the birth of the Great Universe, compete with the Chaos Countless Heavenly Pride, detach from the Great Universe, and become the strongest god general!

There is no need to think about it for a second, Ye Tian has already chosen.

"Chaos Heavenly Prides, I, Ye Tian, am waiting for your arrival!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly and continued the retreat.
